KVK açıklaması

Physiotherapy is an important field of science at our country and world which provide to maintain and restore health. With the effects of our life of developing science and technology, definition of health has changed. Physiotherapy is work to provide necessities of being healthy with work together other scientific fields.

One of the most important factor for sustainability of health policy is a team including qualified members of professions. Physiotherapy technician or physiotherapist assistants graduate from physiotherapy program of vocational collage. They work under the direction and supervision of a physiotherapist or physician to provide care to clients with a wide range of health conditions.

Our physiotherapy program’s goal is to educate physiotherapy technicians who investigates and follows up-to-date information, have good communication skill, are able to use technological tools effectively also care about ethical values and have information about all issues about physiotherapy. Our university aims qualified education with laboratories, academic staff and opportunities of internship.

Our students do internship which lasts for 30 working days, so they can reinforce their theoretical information with practical experiences, recognize their working field and make acquainted with their future co-workers.

Vertical Transfer Opportunities

Graduates of this program can transfer to nursing, nursing and health services and physiotherapy and rehabilitation undergraduate programs.

Career Opportunities

Graduates of this program can be work in public hospitals, university research hospitals, medical centers, physical therapy and rehabilitation hospitals, rehabilitation centers, healthy living centers, sports clubs, elderly care houses, thermal water, spa and wellness centers.

Training Period

2 Years
